headline: Rohingya community faces 12 hate speech incidents monthly
context: Monitoring by human rights groups recorded an average of 12 hate speech incidents targeting Rohingya refugees monthly in Malaysia during 2024.

cards.big: 144 documented hate speech incidents targeting Rohingya in Malaysia in 2024
cards.sub: Social media amplifies xenophobia against Southeast Asia's largest refugee group

cards.big: No specific anti-hate speech legislation exists in Malaysian law
cards.sub: CMA and Penal Code rarely applied to protect minority communities from hate speech

cards.big: 102,000 Rohingya registered with UNHCR Malaysia as of 2025
cards.sub: Without legal status, Rohingya cannot report crimes or seek legal protection

cards.big: Survey found 78% of Rohingya in KL experienced discrimination accessing services
cards.sub: Hate speech translates to denial of healthcare, housing, and employment

cards.big: 12 incidents per month against people who cannot seek legal protection is systemic
Suhakam called for anti-discrimination legislation in its 2024 annual report
